diffs.diff:
--- a/debug_predict.py
+++ b/debug_predict.py
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+import os, sys

+import numpy as np

+import gymnasium as gym

+import humanoid_bench

+from stable_baselines3 import PPO

+

+model_path = "/workspace/ckpt/h1hand-walk-v0"

+if not os.path.exists(model_path + ".zip"):

+    print("Model not found")

+    sys.exit(1)

+

+model = PPO.load(model_path, device='cpu')

+print("Model loaded, obs_shape:", model.observation_space.shape)

+

+# test with raw obs

+obs = np.random.randn(151).astype(np.float64)

+act, _ = model.predict(obs, deterministic=True)

+print("Predict success, action shape:", act.shape)

+

+norm_path = "/workspace/ckpt/h1hand-walk-v0_vecnorm.npz"

+if os.path.exists(norm_path):

+    data = np.load(norm_path)

+    mean = data['mean']

+    var = data['var']

+    obs_norm = (obs - mean) / (np.sqrt(var) + 1e-8)

+    obs_norm = np.clip(obs_norm, -10, 10)

+    act2, _ = model.predict(obs_norm, deterministic=True)

+    print("Norm predict success, action shape:", act2.shape)

+else:

+    print("No norm stats found")
